title: No More Lost Tridents
description: A mod that allows tridents to return to you when they fall in the void
body: YOU THERE!! Are you tired of losing your trident while in the end?? You cry yourself to sleep thinking about that STUPID MISTAKE! Well fret no more friends! For my mod - No More Lost Tridents - changes that. now all tridents that enter the void WILL BE RETURNED!! YIPPEEEEEE!! It works in all voids in custom dimensions as well not just the end. It still is normal trident returning so there is a chance it can be stuck on blocks or be slow so you still have to be somewhat careful with your precious trident.
